steps.action: Run demo gallery Playwright suite and cross-area final gate Vitest suite

assertions.title: Dev server boot + HMR + deep-link routing

assertions.title: Clock skew does not corrupt event ordering or signatures

steps.expected: Skewed-clock sign/ECDH round-trips pass for supported scenarios without runtime skew regressions

steps.expected: Long-session boundedness harness passes for relay count/event-log/heap behavior
steps.observed: Long-session suite passed periodic sign/ECDH/ping boundedness checks and exited 0.

steps.expected: Per-route console transcript proving errors===0 and warns limited to whitelist

assertions.issues: Warning-whitelist clause not directly evidenced by the recorded transcript output.

frictions.description: Clock-skew suite intentionally reports two skipped asymmetric ±120s cases due bifrost-signer max_future_skew_secs=30 protocol cap.
frictions.resolution: Captured skip output as expected behavior and relied on the four passing supported scenarios in the same run.

frictions.description: Targeted Vitest run emits jsdom 'Not implemented: window.scrollTo' stderr noise while all tests still pass.
frictions.resolution: Used exit code and test pass/fail summary as authoritative gate; preserved full transcript for audit context.
